title: Kena
signIn: Kena ho qala lenaneo la hau
forgotPasswordInstructions: Kenya aterese ea imeile eo u e sebelisang ho kena akhaontong ea hau
forgotPasswordSendEmail: Re tla u romela imeile e nang le litaelo tsa ho khetha password e ncha.
twoFactorInstructions: Sebelisa authenticator ea hau e behiloeng ho fumana khoutu 'me u e kenye mona.
enterCodeFromAuthenticator: Kenya Khoutu ho tsoa ho Authenticator
emailVerificationInstructions: Kenya khoutu ea ts'ireletso e romelitsoeng imeiling ea hau.
passwordMustHave: Password e tlameha ho ba le:
alreadyHaveAccount: U se u na le akhaonto?
welcomeBack: Re u amohela hape ho setjhaba sa rona se holang
pleaseEnterUsername: Ka kopo kenya lebitso la mosebedisi
pleaseEnterEmail: Ka kopo kenya aterese ea imeile
pleaseEnterValidEmail: Ka kopo kenya aterese ea imeile e nepahetseng
pleaseEnterGiftcard: Ka kopo kenya nomoro ea karete ea mpho
invalidCode: Khoutu ha e nepahale, ka kopo kenya khoutu e nepahetseng.

oauth.twoFactorPrompt: Verification ea mokhoa o mabeli e lumetsoe bakeng sa akhaonto ena. Kenya khoutu ea authenticator ea hau ho qeta ho kena.
oauth.noLinkedAccount: Ha ho akhaonto e khokahaneng e fumanehileng bakeng sa {name}. Kenya litshebeletso tsa hau tsa ho kena tse leng teng ho khokahanya, kapa theha akhaonto e ncha.
oauth.verifyEmailSent: Khoutu ea verification e romelitsoe imeiling ea hau.
oauth.enterEmailAndPassword: Ka kopo kenya imeile le password

sudo.redirecting: E kenile e le moreki, e lahlela lapeng.
